overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a medieval castle interior featuring an ornate stone fireplace with a roaring fire. A translucent ghostly figure moves along the left periphery of the room, creating a mystical atmosphere. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the warm firelight and Gothic architectural details.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with large ornate fireplace

entered.detail: large Gothic fireplace with carved stone details and a burning fire inside

decorative stone arch framing the fireplace with intricate carvings
rough stone wall with an arched opening or alcove

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static view of a medieval castle common room centered on a large ornate stone fireplace with a warm burning fire. To the left, a translucent ghostly figure moves slowly along the stone wall, fading in and out of view. The Gothic architecture features carved stone details, a raised hearth, and an iron cauldron hanging near the flames, all bathed in warm firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval castle common room where the warmth of a hearth contrasts with a lingering supernatural presence. It begins centered on a large ornate stone fireplace, where a roaring fire casts a deep, flickering glow across the Gothic architecture. As the light dances over the carved stone details and a hanging iron cauldron, a translucent ghostly figure emerges on the left, gliding slowly along the wall. The scene maintains this haunting stillness as the spirit fades in and out of view, blending into the shadows of the raised hearth.
